figures.caption: Fig. 1. Prostate cancer localization paradigms. Unlike standard mpMRI requiring multi-sequence inputs, our proposed Generalized EM leverages DWI strictly as a latent modality during training. This enables highaccuracy inference using only T2w images, overcoming the limitations of standard T2 models. Red denotes ISUP≥3.
TABLE III REGION-LEVEL (PZ/TZ) CSPCA DETECTION UNDER THE PRIMARY DEFINITION. BEST IN BOLD; SECOND BEST UNDERLINED.
TABLE I BARZELL ZONE-LEVEL ISUP GROUP PREDICTION. BEST IN BOLD; SECOND BEST UNDERLINED.
TABLE II BARZELL ZONE-LEVEL CSPCA DETECTION. BEST IN BOLD; SECOND BEST UNDERLINED.
TABLE IV PATIENT-LEVEL CSPCA DETECTION UNDER THE PRIMARY DEFINITION. BEST IN BOLD; SECOND BEST UNDERLINED.

Fig. 4. Samples of T2w images, corresponding real DWI, and DWI synthesized by pretrained LFM, Ours(LDM), and Ours(LFM). The rightmost column shows the corresponding Barzell zone labels by ISUP grade, where white denotes ISUP=0, yellow denotes ISUP=1, orange denotes ISUP=2, and red denotes ISUP≥3.
